title: Tax offset questions T1-T3
description: How to complete the tax offset questions T1 to T3 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: T1 - Spouse (without dependent child or student) 2014
child_links.description: Complete question T3 if you made contributions to a complying superannuation fund or RSA on behalf of your spouse.

child_links.title: T2 - Seniors and pensioners (includes self-funded retirees) 2014
child_links.description: Complete this question if you meet the conditions to claim the seniors and pensioners tax offset.

child_links.title: T3 - Australian superannuation income stream 2014
child_links.description: Complete this question to help you work out if you're eligible for this tax offset and the amount you can claim.

child_links.title: Tax offsets that you show on the supplementary section of the tax return 2014
child_links.description: Complete this question if you had tax offsets you need to complete in the supplementary section of the tax return.

child_links.title: Total tax offsets 2014
child_links.description: Complete this question with the total tax offsets in your tax return.

child_links.title: Adjustments that you show on the supplementary section of the tax return 2014
child_links.description: Instructions for completing adjustments in the supplementary tax return.

child_links.title: Rebate income 2014
child_links.description: Work out your rebate income and if you're eligible for the seniors and pensioners tax offset at question T1.
